examples: A similar pattern appears to be under way in Cuba as raul Castro gradually relaxes some of his ailing, comandante brother's harshest policies.
The mood among the humblest Venezuelans, who put Comandante Hugo in power in the first place, and the disgruntled middle class, accustomed to Western-style consumerism, turns mean.
"We have faith that our comandante will return to Venezuela and with good health, " Caracas resident Nicolas Medina said.
But if these subsidies continue after Mr Castro goes, average Cubans may find that the comandante's passing has little immediate effect on their daily lives.
